videos.headline: Brendan Sorsby shows speed with 41-yard gain
videos.description: Brendan Sorsby turns on the engines for a 41-yard run for Cincinnati vs. Iowa State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brendan Sorsby shows speed with 41-yard gain) 2024/11/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Evan Pryor hustles into the end zone for Cincinnati
videos.description: Evan Pryor gets the Bearcats on the board first with a 12-yard rushing touchdown vs. the Cyclones.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Evan Pryor hustles into the end zone for Cincinnati) 2024/11/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Hansen powers into the end zone for Cyclones
videos.description: Carson Hansen drives into the end zone for the Cyclones on a short rushing touchdown vs. the Bearcats.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Hansen powers into the end zone for Cyclones) 2024/11/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brendan Sorsby zooms for a 41-yard Bearcats TD
videos.description: Cincinnati's Brendan Sorsby takes it to the house for a rushing touchdown vs. Iowa State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brendan Sorsby zooms for a 41-yard Bearcats TD) 2024/11/17 ESHEET
